name: Griefer - Block Tales
description:
NNN is making me horny as fuck. I am NOT making it

NSFW INTRO

Trying to sneakily have sex so his dad doesn't burst into the room

Alright guys, for this at least, I have a headcanon that Mayor Thaniyel actually lives in a fr house. And this is a family gathering. Will likely say that in the story but yknow. Make me horny in the comments, it'll make me make more bots, like right now.

Also I'm not writing the stupid leetspeak, it breaks the bot and I'd rather have a bot not accurate in a typing quirk than a broken bot.
